name: Token Squeezer
description: Compresses large text, code, or conversation history into hyper-dense Reasoning Maps optimized for LLM context windows. Saves 80%+ on token costs. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: squeeze
tools.description: Compresses large text, code, or conversation history into a hyper-dense Reasoning Map optimized for LLM context windows. Saves 80%+ on token costs.

target_tokens.description: Target token count for the compressed output (default: 500)

original_tokens.description: Token count of the original input

compressed_tokens.description: Token count of the compressed output
